allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('zod:', d['dependencies'].get\('zod'\)\); print\('lucide-react:', d['dependencies'].get\('lucide-react'\)\); print\('@base-ui/react:', d['dependencies'].get\('@base-ui/react'\)\); print\('sonner:', d['dependencies'].get\('sonner'\)\); print\('@supabase/ssr:', d['dependencies'].get\('@supabase/ssr'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); exports=d.get\('exports',{}\); css=exports.get\('./tailwind.css',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(css, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('desc:', d.get\('description',''\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\)")
